title: Loopback Social News Items
description: Schema for docs/news.json — items displayed in the banner news ticker. Also feeds news.ics, feed.xml, and events.jsonld for external consumers (calendars, readers, AI agents).

id.description: Stable identifier used as GUID/UID in feed.xml and news.ics. Derived from message+start when omitted.

start.description: Display start datetime in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format.

end.description: Display end datetime in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format.

timezone.description: UTC offset such as '+09:00' or 'Z', or an IANA name such as 'Asia/Seoul'. Defaults to UTC if omitted.

event_start.description: Optional. Actual event start datetime used by news.ics / events.jsonld. Falls back to 'start' when omitted.

event_end.description: Optional. Actual event end datetime used by news.ics / events.jsonld. Falls back to 'end' when omitted.

category.description: Optional. Hint for downstream consumers. 'event' items get calendar VEVENT/Schema.org Event treatment; others remain in RSS only.

location.description: Optional. Human-readable venue (e.g. '서울 강남'). Used in news.ics LOCATION and Event.location.name.

message.description: Ticker message. String or { ko, en } object.

link.description: Optional click-through URL. String or { ko, en } object.

booleanish.description: Boolean, or one of 'true'/'false'/'yes'/'no'/'1'/'0' (case-insensitive). Truthy values enable the item.
